subcodes.first_line: This is a Book for whoso hath been guided by the guidance of God and was among those who have drawn nigh, and for whom hath been ordained in the Tablets that which shall bring him joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب لمن اهتدی بهدی الله و کان من المقبلین و قدر له فی الالواح ما یسر به
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @exhortations and counsels
